summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 new BTP Invoice features: Renovation Kits, Public Client View, and Email Sending. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 new features tested: 1) Renovation Kits with 3 default kits (salle de bain ~3466€, cuisine ~2780€, électrique ~3675€), 2) Public client view via share token, 3) Email sending with PDF attachment (MOCKED - uses test Resend API key)

tests: ✓ 3 default kits available (Rénovation salle de bain, Installation cuisine, Rénovation électrique complète)
✓ Kits visible in quote form as quick buttons
✓ 'Ajouter un kit' button opens selection modal with all kits
✓ Clicking kit adds all its lines to quote (6 lines for kitchen kit)
✓ 'Sauvegarder comme kit' button available in quote form
✓ Settings > Kits tab shows all kits with details
✓ 'Nouveau kit' button opens creation modal
✓ Kit creation modal has name, description, and line items fields
✓ Custom kit creation via API works
✓ Public quote accessible via /client/devis/{token} without authentication
✓ Shows company info, document number, client name
✓ Shows items table with quantities, prices, VAT
✓ Shows totals (HT, TVA, TTC)
✓ Shows status badge in French
✓ 'Télécharger le PDF' button works
✓ Company legal info displayed at bottom
✓ 'Partager' button on quote detail page
✓ Share modal shows generated URL
✓ Copy button available
✓ Share link creation via API works
✓ Share link revocation via API works
✓ 'Envoyer par email' button on quote detail page
✓ Email modal has recipient email field
✓ Email modal has custom message field (optional)
✓ Email modal shows content preview (document number, PDF attachment, online link)
✓ Send button available
✓ API endpoint exists and validates input
email_sending.note: Email API uses test Resend key (re_123_test) - actual sending will fail but UI flow is functional

mocked_apis_list: Resend email API - uses test key re_123_test
